name: Zero Trust Network Access
strategicIntent: Enforce Zero Trust principles across all network boundaries.
problemStatement: Traditional perimeter-based security is insufficient for hybrid cloud environments.

useCases.use: Any production workload accessing corporate resources
useCases.dontUse: Isolated dev sandbox environments with no corporate data

interactionSteps: User authenticates via Azure AD with MFA
securityConsiderations: All access requests must be authenticated and authorized

guardrails.rule: MFA required for all privileged access

exceptionProcess: Submit security exception via ServiceNow with CISO approval.
